sections.heading: Executive Summary
sections.body: This quarter we processed 1,240 alerts with a mean time to triage of 11 minutes. Three incidents escalated to SEV1, all contained within the same business day.

sections.heading: Detection Coverage
sections.body: Coverage grew from 71% to 78% of MITRE ATT&CK techniques following the rollout of new Sigma rules.

sections.heading: Recommendations
sections.body: Prioritize enrichment automation and reduce manual context switching between console tabs.
